title: Loss of document title during vector indexing
symptom: The AI Agent cannot identify the source document title when retrieving information, leading to confusion about the origin of the data.
not_this_if: Titles are manually included in metadata during ingestion
root_cause: When PDF documents are chunked for vector storage, the document title is not automatically included in each chunk's metadata. This results in the loss of context, making it impossible for the AI Agent to reference the source document during retrieval.
fix_steps: Extract the document title from the PDF filename or first page.
Loop through each text chunk and add the title as a metadata property (e.g., item.json.metadata.title = 'Project_A.pdf').
Send the enriched chunks to the Qdrant node for storage.
agent_instruction: Ensure to enrich each text chunk with the document title before sending to Qdrant.
